userStories.story: As a new student, I want to see a greeting flow so that I feel welcome and understand the app
criteria: Given I am a new user
When I first open the app
Then I see a welcome greeting and introduction

userStories.story: As a new student, I want to select my mood so that the app can personalize my experience
criteria: Given I am on the onboarding flow
When I select my current mood
Then the app adapts content recommendations

userStories.story: As a new student, I want to select courses during onboarding so that I can start learning right away
criteria: Given I am on the course selection step
When I select courses and confirm
Then the courses are added to my dashboard

userStories.story: As a student, I want to skip course selection during onboarding so that I can explore at my own pace
criteria: Given I am on the course selection step
Then I am taken to the dashboard without course selection
